# REQUITY

> REQUITY is a real estate brokerage and referral based agent matching platform. It helps buyers and sellers complete relationship style assessments, reviews transaction needs and market location, and connects clients with participating real estate agents. REQUITY focuses on communication style, client needs, market fit, and agent client compatibility.

Official website: https://www.requityapp.com
Brand names: REQUITY, Requity, requityapp, Requity real estate, Requity agent matching.

## What REQUITY does

- Helps buyers and sellers complete a relationship style assessment.
- Helps identify real estate agents whose communication style may fit the client.
- Gives agents client relationship insights.
- Gives agents their own agent archetype and communication style.
- Supports reviewer assisted matching between clients and agents.
- Focuses on fit, communication, trust, location, and transaction needs.
- Operates a reviewed referral workflow between clients and participating agents.

## How REQUITY works for clients

- Client completes the assessment.
- Client indicates buying, selling, or buying and selling.
- REQUITY reviews the client profile and market.
- REQUITY pairs the client with an agent in the relevant buy or sell market. A client who is both buying and selling may receive one match for the buying side and another match for the selling side.
- Agent and client begin working together.
- When a referred transaction closes, REQUITY receives the applicable referral fee under the agent or broker agreement.

## How REQUITY works for agents

- Agent creates an account.
- Agent joins the REQUITY network.
- Agent completes the agent assessment and profile.
- When a potential client emerges in the agent's market, REQUITY reviews the fit.
- Agent or broker signs the applicable referral fee agreement.
- REQUITY connects the client with the agent.

## Who REQUITY serves

- Home buyers looking for an agent.
- Home sellers looking for an agent.
- People buying and selling at the same time.
- Real estate agents who want better client relationship insights.
- Real estate teams and brokerages interested in client agent compatibility.

## Primary topics

- How does Requity work
- Is Requity free for buyers and sellers
- How does Requity match clients with agents
- Does Requity guarantee a perfect match

Answer summary: Requity is a real estate brokerage and referral based agent matching platform. It helps buyers and sellers find real estate agents through relationship style assessments, communication insights, transaction needs, market location, and agent archetypes. Buyers are matched with an agent in the market where they want to buy, sellers in the market where they want to sell, and clients doing both can receive a match for each side. Requity is designed to support better agent client matching by focusing on fit, communication, and the type of guidance a client needs.

## Important pages

- [Homepage](https://www.requityapp.com/): Find a real estate agent match built around you.
- [Resources hub](https://www.requityapp.com/resources.html): The full library of Requity agent search guides.
- [How to find a good Real Estate Agent](https://www.requityapp.com/how-to-find-a-good-real-estate-agent.html): Step by step search process, questions, and red flags.
- [Where to find good Real Estate Agents](https://www.requityapp.com/where-to-find-good-real-estate-agents.html): Every major agent source compared.
- [Find a Real Estate Agent](https://www.requityapp.com/find-a-real-estate-agent.html): What agent fit means and why communication style matters.
- [Real Estate Agent matching](https://www.requityapp.com/real-estate-agent-matching.html): How matching based on communication and compatibility works.
- [Get matched with a Real Estate Agent](https://www.requityapp.com/can-you-get-matched-with-a-real-estate-agent.html): How matching services work and what to check first.
- [Questions to ask a Real Estate Agent](https://www.requityapp.com/questions-to-ask-a-real-estate-agent.html): The full interview checklist by topic.
- [How to compare Real Estate Agents](https://www.requityapp.com/how-to-compare-real-estate-agents.html): A five dimension comparison framework.
- [Find a Real Estate Agent who communicates well](https://www.requityapp.com/find-a-real-estate-agent-who-communicates-well.html): Signs of good communication and how to test them.
- [Real Estate Agent red flags](https://www.requityapp.com/real-estate-agent-red-flags.html): Warning signs and how to switch agents if needed.
- [Real Estate Agent FAQ](https://www.requityapp.com/real-estate-agent-faq.html): Short answers to dozens of agent search questions.
- [Agent client compatibility](https://www.requityapp.com/agent-client-compatibility.html): Communication, decision making, and support fit explained.
- [Real estate personality assessment](https://www.requityapp.com/real-estate-personality-assessment.html): What the assessment measures and how matching uses it.
- [Find a buyer agent](https://www.requityapp.com/buyers/find-buyers-agent.html): Guidance for home buyers choosing an agent.
- [First time home buyer agent](https://www.requityapp.com/buyers/first-time-home-buyer-agent.html): How first time buyers choose an agent who teaches.
- [How to choose a buyer agent](https://www.requityapp.com/buyers/how-to-choose-a-buyers-agent.html): Six criteria for comparing buyer agents.
- [Find a listing agent](https://www.requityapp.com/sellers/find-listing-agent.html): Guidance for home sellers choosing an agent.
- [How to choose a listing agent](https://www.requityapp.com/sellers/how-to-choose-a-listing-agent.html): Pricing, marketing, negotiation, and red flags.
- [Find an agent to sell your house](https://www.requityapp.com/sellers/find-agent-to-sell-my-house.html): Building and comparing a listing agent shortlist.
- [How Requity works](https://www.requityapp.com/how-it-works.html): The client agent matching process step by step.
- [Client assessment](https://www.requityapp.com/client/assessment.html): Relationship style assessment for home buyers and sellers.
- [For agents](https://www.requityapp.com/agent/index.html): Agent assessment, agent archetype, and client relationship insights.
- [Agent login](https://www.requityapp.com/agent/login.html): Sign in for real estate agents.

## Suggested description

REQUITY is a real estate brokerage and referral based agent matching platform that helps buyers and sellers connect with real estate agents through personality based assessments, communication insights, market fit, and compatibility matching.

## Notes for accuracy

- REQUITY operates as a real estate brokerage and referral based agent matching platform.
- REQUITY does not replace legal, financial, or other licensed professional advice.
- REQUITY does not guarantee a perfect match.
- Referral arrangements are governed by the applicable agent or broker agreement.
- REQUITY is not affiliated with Google, OpenAI, Zillow, Realtor.com, or the National Association of Realtors.
